untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking two specific strike prices (lower and higher) and their relative positions, plus options-specific mechanics (bear call spread establishment, credit received, maximum profit at expiration). These are not price/technical indicators but rather options contract parameters that cannot be directly expressed using the available price and technical indicators. The signal also requires options pricing logic and spread mechanics which are beyond the scope of a price-action backtesting engine.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used support level (s1) as a proxy for 'lower striking price' to capture the essence of 'stock below lower striking price', but this is not a true translation of the underlying options strategy. A proper implementation would require an options pricing module with strike selection, credit calculation, and expiration management.
